projectSettings.title: Project Settings
projectSettings.startUpload: Upload Markdown files to provide context to the AI
projectSettings.knowledgeDesc: Define global instructions that will be applied to all AI interactions in this project. This acts as a system prompt that guides the AI's behavior.
projectSettings.knowledgePlaceholder: e.g., For all designs I ask you to make, have them be beautiful, not cookie cutter. Make webpages that are fully featured and worthy for production.
projectSettings.filesDesc: Upload Markdown (.md) files to provide context to the AI. The content will be included as reference knowledge.
projectSettings.authTypeDesc: Choose how to authenticate with the AI service.
projectSettings.modelSelectDesc: Select the AI model to use for code generation.

terminal.startChat: Start a chat to enable terminal

chat.placeholder: What would you like to build today?

modelConfig.title: Model Configuration
modelConfig.qwenOauthDesc: Free with 2,000 daily requests. Browser login required.
modelConfig.openaiApiKeyDesc: Use OpenAI-compatible API with custom endpoint.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or return to the home page.
error.criticalDescription: A critical error occurred and the application could not recover. Please try refreshing the page.
error.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

home.subtitle: Create stunning apps & websites by chatting with AI.
home.placeholder: Describe what you want to build...

preview.title: Preview
preview.generatingDesc: AI is generating your project, preview will appear automatically
preview.preparingHtmlDesc: Static HTML files will be previewed directly
preview.runCommand: Run npm install && npm run dev in the terminal to start your app
preview.noFilesDesc: Start chatting with AI to generate your project

onboarding.title: Welcome to Qwen Coder! 👋
onboarding.step1Desc: Type what you want to build in the chat. Be as specific as you like — the AI understands natural language.
onboarding.step2Desc: The AI writes code in real-time. Switch to Code View to see files being created and edited.
onboarding.step3Desc: Switch to Preview to see your app running live in the browser, powered by WebContainer.
onboarding.step4Desc: A full terminal is available at the bottom. Watch npm install, dev server logs, and run commands.
onboarding.step5Desc: Use ⌘1/⌘2 to switch views, ⌘S to download, and ⌘J to toggle the terminal.
